data.short_note: Payment processing issue due to synchronization interruption
data.summary: Payment synchronization interrupted for bus ticket from Chennai to Coimbatore

intelligence.fix_protocol: Retry payment synchronization and verify transaction status, ensure stable network connection and check for any payment gateway issues

data.neural_response: We apologize for the inconvenience caused by the payment synchronization issue. Our team will investigate and assist you in completing your transaction. Please try again or contact our support for further assistance.
